sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34346" key="e)mpi/esis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐμπῐ´-εσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n34346.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pressure</tr_>, of massage, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:102" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.102</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
